### PR Checklist

As the author of this pull request, before marking it ready for review, confirm that:

- [ ] Every line of the diff has been reviewed
- [ ] Documentation and examples have been updated
- [ ] PHPUnit tests have been added or updated to cover this change
- [ ] This change has been tested against the supported PHP/Symfony matrix
- [ ] This code is ready for review and status checks should pass

More details can be found in the [contributing guide](https://github.com/gabrielhamalwa/storybook-symfony-bundle/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md)
